request_payload.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm convinced we need to prioritize national security over civil liberties. Look at how our allies are stepping up their preparedness—we can't afford to lag behind. The data shows that when we invest in our own defenses, it actually strengthens our alliances. Let's not be naive about the threats we face. #NationalSecurityFirst
